positive: Minimalist, single-sheet illustration of a stylized forest scene at twilight. The composition should be centrally focused, featuring a cluster of abstract, rounded birch trees and deep forest foliage. Use a strong silhouette style against a pale gradient background (gradient of dusty lilac and deep indigo). The trees should have simple, graphic black outlines and solid fill shapes. Incorporate subtle bioluminescent elements like stylized fireflies or glowing mushrooms, rendered in soft, ethereal cyan and lime green. The overall feeling should be whimsical, tranquil, and modern. High contrast, clean lines, vector illustration aesthetic, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
